full_text:
Big bloody piece of hard tumor-like tissue. Used the majority of it and gave a small piece Kauppi lab.

The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H).

Dispase dissociation media included 19.4 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 400 µl Dispase + 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 17.8 ml DMEM/F12+++, 2 ml Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. After that, the pellet looked still red, so redid the RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12++.

The final pellet was resuspended in 6 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Sequentially dissociated cells: RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++.

The final pellet was resuspended in 4 of DMEM/F12+++.

For counting, a 1:10 dilution of both cell suspensions was made.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 5x 10E6 cells

Sequentially dissociated cells: 5x 10E6 cells

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

| | Dispase | Dispase + C&H
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 11.4 | 4.39
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 6.74 | 2.17
 | viability [%] | 59.3 | 49.3
 | size [µm] | 7.9 | 8.4
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 12.5 | 5.37
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 6.19 | 2.05
 | viability [%] | 49.7 | 38.3
 | size [µm] | 7.7 | 8.3
Average | [cells/ml] | 11.95 x10 
= 119.5 E6 | 4.88 x10 
= 48.8 E6
 | total [cells] | 717 E6 in 6 ml | 195.2 E6 in 4 ml
 | viability [%] | 54.5 | 43.8
